title: arbulocarpus sphaerostigma
intro: Arbulocarpus sphaerostigma, also known as the Sphaerostigma or Arbulocarpus, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Arbulocarpus sphaerostigma lie in its essential oil, which contains compounds like limonene and pinene, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections. Arbulocarpus sphaerostigma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
